memberdef.argsstring: (SPI_HandleTypeDef *hspi, uint8_t *pTxData, uint8_t *pRxData, uint16_t Size, uint32_t Timeout)
memberdef.name: HAL_SPI_TransmitReceive

briefdescription.para: STM32 SPI wrapper implementation — full STM32 HAL integration.
